'''shawuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khamsin|khamsin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khamsin|khamsin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shawuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæwizhith|shæwizhith]] || [[word:shæwizhij|shæwizhij]] || [[word:shæwizhish|shæwizhish]] || [[word:shæwizhi|shæwizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shawuwuzhuth|shawuwuzhuth]] || [[word:shawuwuzhuj|shawuwuzhuj]] || [[word:shawuwuzhush|shawuwuzhush]] || [[word:shawuwuzhu|shawuwuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shawuzhuth|shawuzhuth]] || [[word:shawuzhuj|shawuzhuj]] || [[word:shawuzhush|shawuzhush]] || [[word:shawuzhu|shawuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shawufzhuth|shawufzhuth]] || [[word:shawufzhuj|shawufzhuj]] || [[word:shawufzhush|shawufzhush]] || [[word:shawufzhuf|shawufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shawuzhuthu|shawuzhuthu]] || [[word:shawuzhuju|shawuzhuju]] || [[word:shawuzhushu|shawuzhushu]] || [[word:shawuzhuku|shawuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shawuzhuth|shawuzhuth]] || [[word:shawuzhuj|shawuzhuj]] || [[word:shawuzhush|shawuzhush]] || [[word:shawuzhu|shawuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shawuzhuthul|shawuzhuthul]] || [[word:shawuzhujul|shawuzhujul]] || [[word:shawuzhushul|shawuzhushul]] || [[word:shawuzhukul|shawuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shawuzhuthuthu|shawuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:shawuzhujuju|shawuzhujuju]] || [[word:shawuzhushushu|shawuzhushushu]] || [[word:shawuzhuku|shawuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shawuzhuthun|shawuzhuthun]] || [[word:shawuzhujun|shawuzhujun]] || [[word:shawuzhushun|shawuzhushun]] || [[word:shawuzhukun|shawuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shawuzhuthuoro|shawuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:shawuzhujuoro|shawuzhujuoro]] || [[word:shawuzhushuoro|shawuzhushuoro]] || [[word:shawuzhukuoro|shawuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
